findings.claim: SOTA verified is blocked unless every numeric hard threshold over the predeclared core matrix is met.
findings.counterexample: A run can satisfy audit, protocol, TLS/mTLS, sync/async, test matrix, benchmark fairness, report evidence, and final counterexample evidence while its fair libcurl-library benchmark reports only correctly scoped first-tier/partial results that fail one or more hard thresholds; completion_logic still lists no required outcome/result path for threshold pass/fail classification.
findings.suggested_repair: Add a required outcome/result path such as O-sota-threshold-matrix requiring measured libcurl-library evidence for every predeclared core scenario and explicit pass/fail evaluation of every numeric hard threshold; add it to completion_logic and counterexample_gate_contract, with downgrade-to-partial/unverifiable when unavailable or failed.

smallest_counterexample: All listed evidence/subgoals can be true while SOTA verified remains false.

repair_applied.summary: Added O-sota-threshold-matrix, RP-sota-threshold-verdict, completion_logic.sota_verified_requires, no-offset rules, and counterexample contract checks for numeric SOTA threshold verdicts.

review_summary: The first SOTA-definition counterexample gate failed. The executable completion contract did not require numeric SOTA threshold pass/fail evaluation even though the definition contained hard metrics. The repair adds that missing outcome/path and blocks SOTA verified when thresholds are failed or unavailable.
